## ✅ Checklist

### Code Quality
- [ ] I have performed a self-review
- [ ] I have added comments to the code (especially in complex areas)
- [ ] Relevant documentation has been updated
- [ ] No lint errors
- [ ] Type checks pass

### Testing
- [ ] Unit tests have been added/updated
- [ ] E2E tests have been added/updated
- [ ] All tests pass
- [ ] Code coverage has not decreased
- [ ] Confirmed functionality locally

### Security
- [ ] Security concerns have been reviewed
- [ ] No sensitive information is included
- [ ] Input validation has been implemented
- [ ] Vulnerability scans pass

### Performance
- [ ] Performance impact has been checked
- [ ] No unnecessary dependencies added
- [ ] Bundle size impact has been reviewed
- [ ] No memory leaks

### Deployment
- [ ] Breaking changes are clearly noted (if any)
- [ ] Addition/modification of environment variables is documented
- [ ] Migration steps are described (if applicable)
- [ ] Rollback procedure has been confirmed
